style_prefix: Abstract expressive science-fiction painting, exaggerated silhouettes, semantically distorted but readable, sharp central symbol, moody ink and bruised color, no text.

prompts.prompt: Raven containment room: black birds on aluminum perch ladders, warm server vents, glass telemetry wall, low maintenance hatch, surveillance cameras, clinical cage atmosphere.
A black raven watches three human levers: guilty scientist at console, tired mechanic at low hatch, hard security figure near shock wand.
Sealed audit glass: young auditor with glowing slate outside, security handler inside, wing-tag tray below frightened ravens.
Close raven at tiny contact-pad cabinet: black beak, claw on glowing pads, amber-green lights, mirror foil glint, hatch in shadow.
Raven stealing small connector pin and mirror foil near low hatch; juvenile ravens watching; suspicious human silhouette turning.
Raven mid-cry between frozen humans; welfare log reflections on glass; liability made visible as cracked light.
Mirror foil sightline: raven reflects green-tagged bird and compliance numbers into auditor slate through dirty glass.
Perfectly calm raven cage, obedient birds, smooth green telemetry, bad hatch hidden in warm vent shadow.
Amber alarm floods aviary; green-tagged juvenile raven screams; black flock flares wings around a flashing restraint clasp.
A raven poised between four levers: flock perch, contact pad, mirror foil, low hatch; alarm light turns the room into a puzzle.
Confrontation under amber light: security hand near shock wand, scientist at console, mechanic by hatch, raven above pulling strings.
Final threshold: low hatch, hot telemetry cabinet, raised auditor slate behind glass, flock clustered around raven leader.
Warm service duct beyond hatch: black ravens moving into cable shadows, stolen pins on the floor, leader watching from duct mouth.
Humans turn on each other in the aviary while a raven waits above; shock wand, hatch, console, and glass form a trap.
Glowing audit slate captures proof: wing tag, shock wand, scared juvenile, raven sightline, glass reflections like accusation.
Split image: empty perfect cage with green telemetry; hidden server darkness full of ravens, stolen logs, route marks.
